description_long: This is a Denon stereo sound system with a rectangular, matte black chassis and two upright antennas at the rear corners. The front panel features a digital display, two large rotary knobs on either side, and several buttons and ports, including USB and auxiliary inputs. The back panel is densely populated with a wide array of input and output ports, including HDMI, RCA, speaker terminals, and an Ethernet port, all clearly labeled for various audio and video connections. The side panels are mostly solid with minimal features, except for the protruding antennas and some visible ventilation grilles. The top surface is flat and unadorned, suitable for supporting small objects. The overall build suggests a robust, high-quality electronic device designed for home audio or entertainment setups.
description: A matte black Denon stereo sound system with a digital display, dual antennas, and extensive front and rear controls and ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the digital display, two large rotary knobs, several buttons, and USB/auxiliary ports.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid black panel, one antenna, and a glimpse of rear connectors.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a dense array of HDMI, RCA, speaker terminals, Ethernet, and other ports, as well as both antennas.
description_view_3: Back side view with a plain, solid black panel and both antennas visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The front left panel displays the 'DENON' brand logo in white text.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The front panel features two large rotary knobs on either side, a central digital display, several small buttons below the display, and USB/auxiliary ports. All controls are symmetrically arranged and clearly labeled.
